sprint.goal: Fix governance startup in worktrees (#1118 via --no-sqlite flag) + CI stability (#1142 AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT). Next: resume Go kernel delegation (#955).

senior.title: fix: --no-sqlite guard flag + AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT for CI stability
senior.note: PR #1147 supersedes #1143 (closed). AGENTGUARD_GO_TIMEOUT env var is the correct fix for CI flakiness (500ms hard-coded was still insufficient under full test suite load). Previous sprint issues #972/#973/#955/#957/#964 all closed upstream.

prs.note: Regression fix: test expected applied=1 from v4 baseline but v6 was added in #1098 making it applied=2. QA-authored.
